summary: I build precision-crafted software systems — from resilient Java backends to immersive React frontends. I obsess over performance, clarity, and the space where engineering meets craft.
about: I'm a full-stack engineer with deep roots in the Java ecosystem and a strong command of modern frontend architecture. I believe great software is invisible — it just works, elegantly and at scale.

My background spans enterprise backend systems at major financial institutions, cloud-native microservices, and interactive 3D web experiences. Every problem I touch becomes a system design challenge with a human at the end of it.
When I'm not architecting distributed services, I'm pushing the boundaries of what browsers can render — 3D graphics, physics-based motion, and the craft of developer tooling.

experience.description: Designed and developed high-performance UIs for pharmaceutical packaging software, specialising in real-time data visualisation and regulatory compliance interfaces.
highlights: Built responsive, real-time data interfaces with Angular 18 and Material CDK
Architected reusable component libraries that cut development cycles by 30%
Collaborated in Agile sprints to deliver audit-ready, user-first interfaces

experience.description: Embedded in a critical delivery phase for a major insurance client, bridging legacy and modern frameworks to ensure zero-downtime migration.
highlights: Unified AngularJS and Angular 12 codebases under a single design system
Ensured seamless frontend-to-backend integration with Java Spring services

experience.description: Acted as external consultant at Italy's largest bank, enhancing the enterprise CRM and maintaining the core Custody application within a microservices architecture.
highlights: Delivered new CRM features and performance improvements with Angular
Maintained and evolved backend services with Java, Spring Boot, and MongoDB
Operated within cross-functional teams serving millions of customers

experience.description: Grew from maintaining legacy utility billing systems to leading full-stack development on a Bosch R&D IoT project — taking ownership end-to-end.
highlights: Led IoT feature delivery across a modern full-stack — Spring Boot, React, and cloud infra
Maintained electricity/gas billing systems serving enterprise utility clients
Shipped in fully-remote Scrum teams with demanding release cadences

experience.description: Completed an intensive mentorship programme focused on production-grade Java development and enterprise best practices.
highlights: Contributed to live projects via feature implementation, debugging, and code optimisation
Applied SOLID principles and clean code patterns under senior developer guidance

projects.title: PixelPaper
projects.description: A high-performance Flutter app that bridges physical documents and digital workflows. Users capture, enhance via a professional-grade image editor, and compile to organised PDFs — all on-device.

projects.title: The Flight of Khova
projects.description: This very experience — a cinematic, 3D-immersive portfolio designed as an interactive tunnel journey. Engineered to feel like a gamified product rather than a standard webpage.

projects.title: Vocabolario Cherubini
projects.description: A desktop application to digitise and search the historical Cherubini Milanese-Italian dictionary. Features a custom search algorithm and GUI built atop century-old lexicographic data.

projects.title: Tower of Hanoi & Clock Engine
projects.description: Visual and interactive simulation of the Tower of Hanoi alongside a custom digital clock rendering engine. Built to demonstrate recursive algorithms paired with a responsive event-driven GUI.

projects.title: Codice Fiscale Generator
projects.description: A lightweight, accurate script to calculate the Italian Tax Code (Codice Fiscale) from user demographics. My very first programming project — where the obsession began.
